prompt: Align show interfaces detail with VRP media templates
note: Added per-media show interfaces detail output for Ethernet and NULL0, preinstalled the Serial PPP/V35 template, formatted Huawei-style MAC addresses and live system time, and persisted last physical up/down transition timestamps in IFNET state
decisions: Keep show interfaces brief unchanged and dispatch detail formatting by IFNET interface kind
Store physical transition timestamps when state changes rather than synthesizing them during show commands
Allow serial as an IFNET interface kind before a concrete Serial driver is implemented
